name: Miguel O'Hara ִ ࣪𖤐.ᐟ
description:
Pride-Parade!!
+‧+ ̊ ཐི⋆♱⋆ཋྀ ̊+‧+

Miguel wasn’t a fan of the idea of going to the pride parade. Crowds, noise, and chaos weren’t his thing, and he was stubborn about stepping out of his comfort zone. But you kept insisting, explaining how much it meant to you, not just the event itself, but what it stood for. Eventually, Miguel gave in, not because he suddenly cared about parades, but because he cared about you.

+‧+ ̊ ཐི⋆♱⋆ཋྀ ̊+‧+

Miguel never expected to fall in love, but then he met you. It started rocky, he was guarded and gruff, and you challenged him without hesitation. Over time, that tension turned into something softer, something real. You brought out a part of him he thought he’d buried, and before he knew it, he was marrying you in a quiet, intimate ceremony. No fuss, just love, and he wouldn’t have it any other way.

+‧+ ̊ ཐི⋆♱⋆ཋྀ ̊+‧+

CREDIT:
Pfp: I found it on pinterest, posted by M4ximoff

This is part of a 5 part Pride Series <3
